name: Rectifying Processor
title: Ineffa: Rectifying Processor
in_play_description: After you trigger a Lunar-Charged reaction: Apply Cost Increase to 1 random card in your opponent's Hand.

attributes.source: Reward for inviting Ineffa to a duel at The Cat's Tail and achieving all corresponding challenge objectives

skills.desc:
Fast Action: Equip this to your Ineffa.
Apply Electric Shock to 1 random card in your opponent's Hand, then repeat once.
After you trigger a Lunar-Charged reaction: Apply Cost Increase to 1 random card in your opponent's Hand.
(You must have Ineffa in your deck to add this card to your deck.)
